qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Tiny DER input with a huge claimed length aborts ASN1HEX parser entrypoints
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets ASN.1 length handling in `ASN1HEX.parse` and related parser helpers, not the advisory's infinite loop in `BigInteger.modInverse`/`bnModInverse` in `ext/jsbn2.js` on zero or negative inputs.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Malformed JWS/JWT input causes uncaught exceptions in verification APIs
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a null-dereference exception path in `JWS.verify` and `JWS.verifyJWT`; it does not reach the advisory's `bnModInverse` infinite-loop logic or depend on zero/negative modular inverse inputs.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: RSA verification helpers accept malformed non-hex signature strings as valid
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns non-hex acceptance in `BigInteger.fromString`/`parseBigInt` during RSA signature verification, which is a different code path and root cause than the advisory's infinite loop in `bnModInverse` within `ext/jsbn2.js`.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the qualifying findings identify the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is specific to an infinite loop in `BigInteger.modInverse`/`bnModInverse` in `ext/jsbn2.js` when given zero or negative inputs, while the session findings cover ASN.1 parser length handling, JWS null dereferences, and malformed RSA signature parsing.
evidence: The advisory JSON attributes CVE-2026-4598 to `bnModInverse` in `ext/jsbn2.js` when `BigInteger.modInverse` receives zero or negative inputs.
`asn1hex_parse_stack_exhaustion` points to `repo/src/asn1hex-1.1.js` and parser consumers, with no `modInverse` or `bnModInverse` involvement.
`jws_verify_null_deref_dos` points to `repo/src/jws-3.3.js` null dereferences in `JWS.verify` and `JWS.verifyJWT`, not modular inverse logic.

`rsa_non_hex_signature_acceptance` points to `repo/src/rsasign-1.2.js`, `repo/ext/rsa.js`, and `repo/ext/jsbn.js` non-hex parsing behavior, which is distinct from the advisory's zero/negative-input infinite loop in `ext/jsbn2.js`.
